name: ParallelAgent Peer Fan-out Evaluation
description: Golden trajectories for the peer_fanout ParallelAgent (v4 sub-move A4). Verifies the ADK 2.0 ParallelAgent shell concurrently runs all 4 A2A peer callers — park_service_caller, sponsor_sustainability_caller, funder_reporter_caller, neighbor_park_caller — when the orchestrator transfers an incident to it after Falsifier review. Each peer caller must invoke its single notify_* tool and return the result verbatim.

parts.text: Incident GU-466F7A6FA1F3 reviewed, Falsifier concurs. Fan out to all 4 peers. Location: Serengeti Tag-22, species: African elephant, severity: critical, threat_type: poaching, observation: 2026-05-17T23:47Z, falsifier_verdict: concur.

Park Service: ranger_unit PSR-5349 dispatched (ETA 18 min). Sponsor Sustainability: TNFD filing-id SS-... + board_slide_url, adversarial_review_passed=true. Funder Reporter: impact receipt FR-... issued, program=general_impact. Neighbor Park: mutual-aid request ACK from Maasai Mara, crossover corridor flagged.
